*Terms & Conditions Apply. The product & feature images shown in this brochure is for representation purpose only. Features and specifications as shown may not be part of standard fitment and may vary. The colors shown are subject to availability and may not be available across all variants and may differ slightly from those shown in this brochure. **Program coverage includes repair of 1 scratch free of cost in an ownership period of 12 months from the date of sale. Applicable for all new Carnival Limousine retailed up to 31st March 2025. ^With R 18 alloy wheel and roof rails. #Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) is not a substitute for human eye and driver vigilance. It is an assistance feature that enhances driving experience and safety. Effectiveness of ADAS may vary based on actual situation and all objects around vehicle may not be detected. The driver shall remain responsible for safe, vigilant, and attentive driving. Next-gen Kia Connect comes with 3 year free subscription. Amazon Alexa device is not a standard car accessory & the customer needs to purchase from a third party. Next-gen Kia Connect skill features may vary depending on the variant, device compatibility, software and network availability both in the vehicle and Alexa device. Next-gen Kia Connect skill is only available in India and can be interacted with in English and Hindi. ºRSA coverage across India except Andaman & Nicobar Islands and Lakshadweep. ``IoT based workshops for live vehicle tracking for digital experience. The specifications and features may vary depending on models/ variants. Kia India Pvt. Ltd.
